sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 131 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.16 & 20 2. For hearing of CMA No.151/2018 3. For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
